thoughts.label: NVDA STOP-ZONE APPROACHING
thoughts.text: NVDA is at $194.54 AH — only 2.37% above its manual stop level of $190.04. The quant matrix confirms the caution: MACD has flipped Bearish and volume is High on the decline. Highest-priority check at the 6 AM session.

thoughts.label: MU QUANT BLOCK (Z=2.64)
thoughts.text: MU's composite score is BEARISH (-0.42) despite the bullish thesis — its Z-score of 2.64 flags it as statistically overbought and the §4.1 rules auto-block any entry above Z>2.0. This is exactly why the signal engine exists: it stops CLU from chasing a +15% post-earnings spike.

thoughts.label: QUANT-GATED ENTRY QUEUE
thoughts.text: Buying power is zero — no AH trades. 6 AM priorities ranked by composite score: RXRX (+0.40 BULLISH, gate 4/5), PANW (+0.33 BULLISH, gate 4/5), then NVDA stop check and ARM Gate 2 reassessment.

thoughts.label: ETF MIGRATION SIGNALS CLEAN
thoughts.text: The ETF migration targets (QQQ, SOXX, VOO) all show clean BULLISH-to-NEUTRAL composites with no extreme Z-scores — confirming §13's thesis that ETFs produce lower-noise signals than single stocks. ARKK→QQQ swap stays queued at the +10% trigger.

thoughts.label: ARM TREND BROKEN
thoughts.text: ARM's 50-day trend has flipped Down and MACD is Bearish — the quant layer corroborates the Gate 2 fundamental block (downgrade + insider selling + 431x P/E). Composite -0.30. Holding in Pending Verdict; no re-promotion until both quant and news clear.

thoughts.label: LEARNING LOOP ARMED
thoughts.text: All 4 active positions are logged in the Trade Accuracy Ledger awaiting their 5-day grade (first evaluation 2026-07-01/02). From this point forward every entry is scored against outcome and failing signal setups auto-populate DO-NOT-TRADE.

learned_patterns.pattern: Z-score > 2.0 reliably catches post-earnings overextension before CLU chases it. MU at Z=2.64 was auto-blocked despite a strong thesis and +24.3% beat — the composite read BEARISH (-0.42) purely from statistical overextension.

MU earnings beat = semiconductor sector lift next session. 8 consecutive beats with accelerating magnitude. Q3 FY26 +24.3% beat → entire complex lifted next day (INTC +1.03%, MRVL +1.77%, AMD +2.49%).

Analyst downgrades after 200%+ rallies are high-conviction Gate 2 blockers — DELL post-200% run (-5.65%), ARM post-235% run (-23% from ATH). The quant layer corroborates: ARM Trend flipped Down, MACD Bearish.

ETF composites (QQQ +0.30, SOXX +0.31, VOO +0.26) cluster in a tight low-noise band with no extreme Z-scores, versus single stocks that swing from MU -0.42 to RXRX +0.40. Confirms §13: ETFs reduce signal noise and false stop-loss triggers.

Fractional positions cannot use conditional sell orders. Only market sells available. Manual monitoring at every session is the sole stop-loss mechanism — NVDA approached its stop within one session of entry.
Retrace entry validated: MRVL gap-up >2% → gap-up rule applied → price retraced to $279.03 → market order executed. Do not chase gap-ups; set retrace target and wait.

alerts.title: Quant Signal Engine Online (v0.6)
alerts.message: CLU is now a hybrid quant-agentic system. The Signal Matrix above is computed locally in Python before each session (RSI, MACD, Z-score, composite). This matrix is a seed snapshot; the first fully-automated GitHub Actions run populates live values at 5:50 AM PDT 2026-06-26.
